channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Road works not completed, 17th July
item.description:
The road works and associated road closure were scheduled to finish on 17 July at 5 pm, yet the road remains closed. Bus routes are still being diverted, and road‑work materials have been left abandoned in the area. This prolonged disruption is unacceptable. Please provide a clear explanation for the delay and confirm when the road will be fully reopened.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rosebery Avenue, Holborn, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Frequent dog foul and urine, 17th July
item.description:
Frequent dog foul and urine. need cleaning and signs

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 15, Albert Road, Ramsden, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Traffic cones used to reserve parking, 17th July
item.description:
Outside 33 Bowen Drive two yellow traffic cones are frequently used to reserve parking.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bowen Drive, Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter along footpath and kerb area, 17th July
item.description:
I have reported excess litter three times now and receive an email to say it has been fixed but it clearly hasn’t. The rubbish in this road is constant due to the traffic of cars and pedestrians who have no litter bins so just throw their litter on the road and it is rarely cleared so builds up

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 7, Blyth Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter, 17th July
item.description:
2nd time reporting this. The litter is all over the bottom and top steps. cigarettes everywhere and random items left behind. smashed glass bottles always at the bottom of the stairs, which i have injured myself on. alcohol cans always left behind on stairs. this has been a problem for years
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Harrow Manorway, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Human Forest and Lime hire bikes left abandoned blocking the pavement and road dangerously, 17th July
item.description:
Reported overcrowded Human Forest and Lime hire bikes left abandoned blocking the pavement and road dangerously as shown in picture. Might hurt somebody. Opposite Hippodrome casino at Little Newport Street.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 11, Newport Place, Chinatown, City of Westminster
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rocking paving slab, 17th July
item.description:
On the public pavement directly outside number 33 Bromley Avenue. A large, flat paving slab is loose and rocks heavily when stepped on. It creates an immediate tripping hazard for pedestrians.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bromley Avenue, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree outside 20 Heath Hurst Rd NW3 2RX, 17th July
item.description:
The support is broken for the street tree outside 20 Heath Hurst Rd NW3 2RX – see pic attached. Could someone please renew the support.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 18, Heath Hurst Road, Belsize Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A NCIL Daily Survey problem has been found, 17th July
item.description:
A NCIL Daily Survey problem has been found by Brent Council

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Stafford Close, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Toilet outside flats, 17th July
item.description:
Has been there for weeks, highly unhygienic and a waste hazard.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): St Georges Way, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Daily flytipper, 17th July
item.description:
The people that live opposite this dumped rubbish put stuff there almost every day, there is possible evidence of the offenders in the rubbish on this occasion

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Greenmoor Road, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Urine bins and dog poo, 17th July
item.description:
Multiple issues of poo urine and bins left outside the wall

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Balaclava Road, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cars keep parking on double yellow lines, 17th July
item.description:
These cars have been parking here on double yellow lines for months. They rev their engines repeatedly after midnight and wake up nearby residents night after night. They are creating a bottleneck on a very busy cycle route outside Pub on the Park

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Martello Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A NCIL Daily Survey problem has been found, 17th July
item.description:
A NCIL Daily Survey problem has been found by Brent Council
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Granville Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Excessive Flies, 17th July
item.description:
Had about 50-60 flies enter my window from the bins. I’m unsure if the bins need cleaning or if something is rotting. But it’s very unhygienic.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Clissold Crescent, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on fence, 17th July
item.description:
This graffiti has been only partially removed

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): St Johns Park, Blackheath
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Over grown shrubs / thorns, 17th July
item.description:
Very overgrown bushes and thorns coming into gardens in front

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Raglan Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Whole sofa dumped covering the pavement, 17th July
item.description:
Whole sofa has been dumped on the pavement completely blocking it

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Homefield Road, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car has been abandoned on street for several weeks now, 17th July
item.description:
There is a black peugeot that has been abandoned on Highland Road for several weeks.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Highland Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside no.76 Priory Park Road, 17th July
item.description:
Paving slab completely cracked with loose pieces. Dangerous trip hazard.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Priory Park Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
